A violent [[Plant/Legends|herbivorous]] [[Species/Legends|species]] known as '''krusk''' was native to<ref name="GCG" /> the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> [[Bothawui/Legends|Bothawui]]. The species name was used by the [[Bothan/Legends|Bothans]],<ref name="GCG" /> a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species native to the planet,<ref name="UAA">''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]''</ref> as a first name given to some members of the [[Gender/Legends|male]] sex.<ref name="GCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
The species known as krusk was first mentioned in the ''[[Galactic Campaign Guide]]'', a [[2003]] sourcebook for [[Wizards of the Coast]]'s ''[[Star Wars Roleplaying Game]]'', written by [[Peter M. Schweighofer|Peter Schweighofer]] and [[J.D. Wiker]]. The plural form of the species name and its level of sentience were not mentioned in the book, which only included a description of the species in a table of Bothan male names.<ref name="GCG" />
